landing.heroSubtitle: A smart platform for creating personalized greeting videos for employees - birthdays, holidays, achievements and more. Each organization gets its own branded system.
landing.whyChooseUsSubtitle: A complete platform for managing organizational greeting videos with custom branding for each company
landing.customBrandingDesc: Logo, colors, fonts and custom domain for each organization. Each company gets a unique look
landing.userManagementDesc: Flexible permissions - system admins, org admins and regular users. Full control
landing.fastCreationDesc: Ready-made templates or AI creation. CSV upload for bulk personalized video creation
landing.sampleTemplatesSubtitle: A variety of designed templates for every occasion - customizable for each organization
landing.readyToStartSubtitle: Contact your system administrator or enter the admin panel to create a new organization
